title: astragalus cognatus
intro: Astragalus cognatus is a plant species within the legume family, scientifically known as a type of vetch, that is native to the mountainous regions of China and India. The medicinal properties of Astragalus cognatus include its ability to boost the immune system and reduce inflammation, making it a valuable resource in traditional Chinese medicine. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to improve respiratory function, reduce fatigue, and alleviate symptoms of anemia. Astragalus cognatus is often prepared into herbal teas, capsules, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall well-being and promote a healthy immune response.
